title: .env Parser & Converter
description: Paste your .env content to parse it into a key/value table and convert it to JSON / YAML / Shell export in real time, with validation for common issues.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: All parsing and conversion happen inside your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.

input.heading: Input
input.label: Paste content
input.placeholderEnv:
# Example
export API_KEY="sk-12345"
DB_HOST=localhost
DEBUG=true # inline comment

jsonNotObject: Input must be a JSON object (key/value map).

table.heading: Parsed result
table.empty: No key/value pairs to show yet

issues.heading: Validation
issues.duplicate: Duplicate key {{key}} (line {{line}}); the later value overrides the earlier one.
issues.invalidKey: Key {{key}} (line {{line}}) has an invalid name; it should match [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*.
issues.invalidKeyNoLine: Key {{key}} has an invalid name; it should match [A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*.
issues.suspiciousUnquoted: Key {{key}} (line {{line}}) has an unquoted value containing spaces and may be truncated; consider quoting it.
issues.noEquals: Line {{line}} has no '=' and was ignored: {{raw}}

output.heading: Conversion output
output.empty: The converted result appears here once content is parsed.
